representative_task.goal: For one privileged workflow, one Playwright configuration, and one repository-local skill change, select the smallest complete verification lanes that can disprove security, TypeScript project-graph, and skill-package regressions.

held_constant.permissions: local read-only planner execution with no network access
held_constant.environment: same macOS host, Node runtime, evaluator code, changed paths, and acceptance predicate
held_constant.evaluator: summarizeHarnessPlan output contains every required command

before_reconstruction.method: HEAD archive plus the preserved pre-implementation worktree patch and untracked-file archive in a fresh directory outside the repository

interpretation.observed: The current planner selected all three required lanes; the reconstructed pre-implementation planner selected none of them.
interpretation.tradeoff: Startup context increased by 1224 bytes and remains below the 26000-byte enforced budget.
not_proven: product behavior outside this representative feedback-routing task

verification.result: macOS local gate passed with a named native Windows 11 gap and the explicit nonconforming no-CI user override

commands.evidence: 807 harness and script tests, 2,933 frontend tests, production and Storybook builds, 10 Playwright smoke tests within the 30-second budget, Rust formatting and Clippy, and the complete Rust workspace test lane passed.

The installed read-only audit inventoried instructions, environment, state, and feedback, reported zero tool candidates, and emitted only informational local-hook leads. The live manifest, package registry, and declared script and skill roots independently establish the Tools owner; the audit's zero count is not treated as absence.
Removed dist, storybook-static, and test-results created by the full local gate; the bounded cleanup excludes target and source paths.

warnings: The host ran Node.js 26.5.0 instead of the .nvmrc-owned 24.18.0 baseline.
The host ran npm 11.17.0 instead of the package.json-owned 12.0.1 release baseline.

native_windows_11_gap.missing_evidence: No native Windows 11 run from this working tree.
native_windows_11_gap.smallest_validation: Run pwsh -File ./init.ps1 and npm run test:scripts on a native Windows 11 host.

hosted_ci.canonical_status: nonconforming user override; no claim of canonical CI compliance
